summary: Providing Iran with satellite intelligence and S-400 air defense components. Vetoed UN ceasefire resolution.

summary: Calling for ceasefire while maintaining energy imports from Iran. Chinese-made drone components found in Iranian weapons.

summary: Leading ceasefire mediation efforts. Imposed sanctions on both Iranian military and select arms flows. Providing humanitarian aid.

summary: First traditionally neutral Western nation to formally condemn US-Israel strikes as violating international law.
